summary: Iteration 77: Tested Hive Feed Filter Bar feature. All 8 requested features verified working. Filter bar renders with 7 options (All, Now Spinning, New Haul, ISO, For Sale/Trade, A Note, Following), buttons are clickable with visual state change, filtering works correctly, and empty state message changes based on active filter.
passed_tests: FRONTEND: Hive feed filter bar renders with all 7 filter options (All, Now Spinning, New Haul, ISO, For Sale/Trade, A Note, Following) - VERIFIED via Playwright
FRONTEND: Filter bar buttons are clickable and visually change state when active (bg-vinyl-black class applied) - VERIFIED via Playwright
FRONTEND: The 'All' filter shows all posts (20 posts in test) - VERIFIED via Playwright
FRONTEND: Each filter button properly filters posts by type when clicked - VERIFIED (NOW_SPINNING: 2, NEW_HAUL: 2, ISO: 2, listing: 12, NOTE: 2, following: 0)
FRONTEND: Filter bar has data-testid='feed-filter-bar' - VERIFIED via Playwright
FRONTEND: Each filter button has correct data-testid (filter-all, filter-NOW_SPINNING, filter-NEW_HAUL, filter-ISO, filter-listing, filter-NOTE, filter-following) - VERIFIED via Playwright
FRONTEND: Empty state message changes based on active filter ('no Following posts yet' for Following filter) - VERIFIED via Playwright
FRONTEND: Hive page loads without errors and shows posts - VERIFIED via Playwright
critical_code_review_comments: FEED_FILTERS array (lines 412-420) correctly defines all 7 filters with proper keys matching backend post_type values
NOTE filter key is correctly uppercase 'NOTE' (line 418) to match backend post_type - bug fix verified
filteredPosts memo (lines 465-470) correctly filters posts: 'all' returns all, 'following' excludes own posts, 'listing' matches both listing_sale and listing_trade, others match exact post_type
Filter bar UI (lines 654-669) correctly renders with data-testid='feed-filter-bar' and individual filter buttons with data-testid='filter-{key}'
Active filter state styling uses bg-vinyl-black for active buttons vs bg-stone-100 for inactive
seed_data_creation: Created test posts via API: NOTE post ('Testing filter bar!'), ISO post (Radiohead - OK Computer), NEW_HAUL post (Daft Punk - Random Access Memories) to ensure all post types available for filter testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hive feed filter bar feature fully implemented and tested. 7 filter options available: All (shows all posts), Now Spinning, New Haul, ISO, For Sale/Trade (matches listing_sale OR listing_trade), A Note (uses NOTE key to match backend post_type), Following (shows posts from followed users only, excludes own posts). The 'note' → 'NOTE' bug fix was verified - filter key now matches backend post_type exactly. Test user vinylcollector@honey.io has posts of multiple types for testing. MOCKED: Resend email service is mocked.

filters.label: Following
filters.behavior: Excludes user's own posts (shows only followed users)
